top_signals.title: US escalates attacks on Iran as it expands range of targets
top_signals.summary: American forces hit deeper inside the country as Islamic republic reports strikes on its infrastructure
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran-Linked LPG Tankers Turn Back as U.S. Blockade Tightens
top_signals.summary: Iran-linked carriers of liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) have made U-turns and traveled in zig-zagging patterns in recent hours as they face the U.S. naval blockade in the Gulf of Oman, after having cleared the Strait of Hormuz outbound into the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea. The Glendale and Danuta I LPG carriers, sanctioned by the United States, have made abrupt changes in course in the Arabian Sea and the Gulf of Oman, or have made U-turns before potentially running into the U.S. blockade, vessel-tracking data compiled by Bloomberg showed on…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK gang jailed over $5.4 million crypto scam posing as police
top_signals.summary: The gang impersonated police officers and used convincing fake police websites to steal more than £4M in cryptocurrency from eight victims.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Nasdaq 100 Futures Tumble 2% as Chip Rout Deepens: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Nasdaq 100 futures tumbled 2% as the global selloff in chipmakers gathered pace, with traders rushing to exit positions in stocks that had fueled this year’s rally but whose valuations grew increasingly demanding.
